_comment: SCA exceptions — CVEs accepted as known risk with justification.

exceptions.reason: XS-Search CSRF bypass via browser. Not applicable — this API uses Authorization header Bearer token auth, not session cookies. Browsers never send Authorization headers cross-origin without explicit CORS approval, which is tightly controlled in index.js. The attack vector requires a browser to make credentialled cross-site requests, which is not possible in this architecture.
exceptions.why_not_upgrading_to_v5: @apollo/server v5 removed the @apollo/server/express4 subpath export. The new Express integration path is not yet confirmed stable. Pinned to latest v4 (4.11.3) until v5 Express integration is verified.
exceptions.fix_ticket: TODO: verify @apollo/server v5 Express integration path and upgrade — revisit 2026-07-01
